description_long: This house features a single-story layout with a mix of modern and traditional architectural elements. The front facade includes a covered porch with white railings, steps leading up to the entryway, and a prominent glass sunroom with an arched window. The structure is clad in light-colored siding, with large windows providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. A transparent blue awning extends over the porch area, adding a contemporary touch. The rear of the house includes a fenced patio or deck area, and the overall footprint is rectangular with a well-maintained green lawn surrounding the building.
description: A single-story house with a covered porch, large arched sunroom window, light siding, and a transparent blue awning, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, steps, white railings, and the large arched sunroom window on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the transparent blue awning over the porch and the linear arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced patio/deck area and the back entrance, with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sunroom's glass structure and the side window, with the lawn extending around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and an arched sunroom window
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with white railings, steps, and a simple door, accented by a transparent blue awning.
